'''wathowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalliwag|scalliwag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalliwag|scalliwag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wathowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wætheweth|wætheweth]] || [[word:wæthewej|wæthewej]] || [[word:wæthewesh|wæthewesh]] || [[word:wæthewe|wæthewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wathothowoth|wathothowoth]] || [[word:wathothowoj|wathothowoj]] || [[word:wathothowosh|wathothowosh]] || [[word:wathothowo|wathothowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wathowoth|wathowoth]] || [[word:wathowoj|wathowoj]] || [[word:wathowosh|wathowosh]] || [[word:wathowo|wathowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wathofwoth|wathofwoth]] || [[word:wathofwoj|wathofwoj]] || [[word:wathofwosh|wathofwosh]] || [[word:wathofwof|wathofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wathowotho|wathowotho]] || [[word:wathowojo|wathowojo]] || [[word:wathowosho|wathowosho]] || [[word:wathowoko|wathowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wathowoth|wathowoth]] || [[word:wathowoj|wathowoj]] || [[word:wathowosh|wathowosh]] || [[word:wathowo|wathowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wathowothol|wathowothol]] || [[word:wathowojol|wathowojol]] || [[word:wathowoshol|wathowoshol]] || [[word:wathowokol|wathowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wathowothotho|wathowothotho]] || [[word:wathowojojo|wathowojojo]] || [[word:wathowoshosho|wathowoshosho]] || [[word:wathowoko|wathowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wathowothon|wathowothon]] || [[word:wathowojon|wathowojon]] || [[word:wathowoshon|wathowoshon]] || [[word:wathowokon|wathowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wathowothoro|wathowothoro]] || [[word:wathowojoro|wathowojoro]] || [[word:wathowoshoro|wathowoshoro]] || [[word:wathowokoro|wathowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
